question_en: I went 10 m East, then turned North and walked 15 m, then turned West and walked 12 m, and then turned South and walked 15 m. How far will I be from my home?
question_hi: मैं 10 मी. पूर्व में गया फिर उत्तर में मुड़ा और 15 मी. चला, फिर पश्चिम में मुड़ा और 12 मी. चला और फिर दक्षिण मुड़ा और 15 मी. चला। मैं मेरे घर में कितना दूर पर होगा?
subject: reasoning
explanation: Starting from the origin, moving 10m East, 15m North, 12m West, and 15m South puts the person 2m West of the starting point.
fingerprint: i went 10 m east then turned north and walked 15 m then turned west and walked 12 m and then turned south and walked 15 m how far will i be from my home

question_en: ___ is the number of pixels recharged per second so that their brightness is maintained.

subject: general-awareness
explanation: Refresh rate refers to the frequency at which a display updates the image on screen, typically measured in hertz (Hz).
fingerprint: is the number of pixels recharged per second so that their brightness is maintained

question_en: The ratio of boys and girls in a college is 7:8. If the number of boys and girls increases by 20% and 10% respectively, what will be the new ratio?
question_hi: एक कॉलेज में लड़कों और लड़कियों की संख्या का अनुपात 7:8 है । यदि लड़कों और लड़कियों की संख्या में क्रमश: 20% और 10% कि वृद्धि होती है, नया अनुपात क्या होगा?
subject: maths
explanation: Let initial numbers be 70 and 80. After a 20% and 10% increase, they become 84 and 88, which simplifies to the ratio 21:22.
fingerprint: the ratio of boys and girls in a college is 78 if the number of boys and girls increases by 20 and 10 respectively what will be the new ratio

question_en: 5 boys are in a row. A is to the right of B, E is to the left of B but to the right of C. Who is sitting in the middle?
question_hi: 5 लड़के एक पंक्ति में बाएँ हैं। A, B के दाएँ है, E, B के बाएँ है, परंतु C के दाएँ है, तो मध्य में कौन बैठा है?
subject: reasoning
explanation: Arranging them according to the conditions gives C, E, B, A, with one more unplaced. However, B must be in the middle of these relative positions.
fingerprint: 5 boys are in a row a is to the right of b e is to the left of b but to the right of c who is sitting in the middle

question_en: In this question, two statements are given followed by two conclusions. Choose the conclusions that fit best logically. Statement: 1. All pens are pencils. 2. All books are pens. Conclusions: I. Some books are pens. II. Some pencils are books.
question_hi: इस प्रश्न में, दो कथन दिए गए हैं जिनके बाद दो निष्कर्ष दिए गए हैं । वे निष्कर्ष चुनिए जो तार्किक रूप से सर्वोत्तम सटीक बैठते हैं। कथन: 1. सभी पेन पेंसिल हैं। 2. सभी पुस्तकें पेन हैं। निष्कर्ष : I. कुछ पुस्तकें पेन है। II. कुछ पेंसिल्स पुस्तकें हैं।
options_en: Neither conclusion I nor II follows
Both conclusions I and II follow
options_hi: केवल निष्कर्ष II अनुसरण करता है।
न तो निष्कर्ष I न ही II अनुसरण करता है
केवल निष्कर्ष I अनुसरण करता है
दोनों निष्कर्ष I और II अनुसरण करते हैं
subject: reasoning
explanation: Since all books are pens, some books must be pens. Since all books are pens and all pens are pencils, all books are pencils, meaning some pencils are books.
fingerprint: in this question two statements are given followed by two conclusions choose the conclusions that fit best logically statement 1 all pens are pencils 2 all books are pens conclusions i some books are pens ii some pencils are books

explanation: Adaptive radiation is an evolutionary process where many species evolve from a single ancestor species to fill available ecological niches.
fingerprint: the evolution of different species starting from a point in a given geographical area and radiating to other areas of geography habitats is called

question_en: Consider the following statements about World Trade Organization (WTO). I. WTO is the only global international organization dealing with the rules of trade between nations. II. Afghanistan joined the WTO on July 29 as the 164th member. Choose the correct option given below.
question_hi: विश्व व्यापार संगठन (डब्ल्यूटीओ) के बारे में निम्नलिखित कथनों पर विचार करें। I. विश्व व्यापार संगठन (डब्ल्यूटीओ) एकमात्र वैधिक अंतर्राष्ट्रीय संगठन है जो राष्ट्रों के बीच व्यापार के नियमों का संचालन करती है। II. अफगानिस्तान 164वें सदस्य के रूप में 29 जुलाई को विश्व व्यापार संगठन में शामिल हुआ। नीचे दिए गए सही विकल्प का चयन करें।
options_en: Both statements I and II are correct
options_hi: कथन I और II दोनों सही हैं
subject: general-awareness
explanation: WTO indeed oversees global trade rules, and Afghanistan became its 164th member in 2016.
fingerprint: consider the following statements about world trade organization wto i wto is the only global international organization dealing with the rules of trade between nations ii afghanistan joined the wto on july 29 as the 164th member choose the correct option given below

question_en: How many letters in the word BRAKES will remain unchanged when arranged in alphabetical order?
question_hi: शब्द BRAKES में कितने अक्षरों की स्थिति उन्हें वर्णानुक्रम में व्यवस्थित करने पर अपरिवर्तित रहेगी?
subject: reasoning
explanation: The letters of BRAKES are B, R, A, K, E, S. Sorted, they are A, B, E, K, R, S. Only the letter 'S' remains in the last position and K remains in its position. So, two letters keep their position.
fingerprint: how many letters in the word brakes will remain unchanged when arranged in alphabetical order
